message:
test(core): property-based tests for build_coord, wait, extensions (55 tests)

build_coord (15 tests): detect_cargo_command parsing invariants
(alias resolution, whitespace, rejection of non-cargo/unknown),
BuildCoordConfig and BuildLockMetadata serde roundtrips.

wait (26 tests): Backoff::next_delay monotonicity and capping,
QueueDepthGauge increment/decrement/saturation, ActivityTracker
state transitions, WaitError Display format, QuiescenceState
behavioral properties, WaitFor constructors.

extensions (14 tests): ExtensionSource/ExtensionInfo/ExtensionDetail/
ExtensionRuleInfo/ValidationResult serde roundtrips, resolve_extensions_dir
path invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
